channel.title: MapleDevs Latest Jobs
channel.description: Latest Canadian game industry jobs from MapleDevs.

item.title: Analyste en intelligence de jeu at Ubisoft

item.title: Game Writer (Intern) at Red Diamond
item.description: Red Diamond - Halifax, Nova Scotia - On-site. Red Diamond is seeking interns to work as writers on an upcoming dark fantasy mobile game and tabletop RPG. In this role, you will contribute to lore, world-building, creatures, characters, and other elements within an established bu...
